data.title: Digital Euro Network Set for 2029 Launch for Private Payments
data.description: According to PANews, European Central Bank Executive Board Member Fabio Panetta announced that the digital euro network is expected to be ready by 2029 for use in private payment systems. This development marks a significant step in the integration of digital currency within the European financial system.

data.title: OneChain officially announced the completion of its Series A strategic financing round, raising $67 million.
data.description: OneChain recently announced the completion of a $67 million Series A strategic financing round. This round of financing will primarily be used to build a complete on-chain infrastructure for Real-World Assets (RWAs) for institutional asset issuers, financial institutions, and global investors, providing a one-stop solution for real-world assets from issuance, management, ownership verification to liquidity trading. This round of financing was jointly invested by Bitgo Capital, East Bank, PACIFIC BANK, and UBpay, with GBEX Holdings serving as the exclusive financial advisor. Tokenizing Real-World Value (OneChain) is dedicated to transforming real-world value into on-chain assets and is a compliant RWA asset issuance and management platform for the global market.

data.title: Bitcoin Holdings Increase, Reducing Average Cost for Strategy
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 18, Arkham reported that Strategy has recently increased its Bitcoin holdings by $168.4 million. This acquisition has lowered the average holding cost for MSTR by $29, bringing it down to $76,027. The last time there was a decrease in average cost was on September 25, 2023, nearly two and a half years ago.

data.title: European Central Bank official: The digital euro network will be ready for use by private payment systems by 2029.
data.description: European Central Bank Executive Board member Cipolo Nguema stated that the digital euro network will be ready for use by private payment systems by 2029. (Jinshi)

data.title: STOCKS | Carrefour Shares Decline Following Disappointing French Sales
data.description: Carrefour's stock experienced a downturn after the company announced lower-than-anticipated sales figures in France. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the impact of the disappointing performance on the retailer's market value. The French grocery chain, known for its extensive network of hypermarkets, faced challenges in its domestic market, which contributed to the decline in share prices. Analysts noted that the weaker sales figures could affect Carrefour's overall financial outlook, prompting concerns among investors. The company is expected to address these issues in its upcoming financial reports.

data.title: Bitcoin Steadies Near $68,000 as Traders Await Fed Minutes
data.description:
Key Takeaways: Investors are focused on the Federal Reserve’s January meeting minutes for rate guidance.
source: https://coindoo.com/bitcoin-steadies-near-68000-as-traders-await-fed-minutes/

data.title: CryptoQuant CEO Warns of Quantum Computing Threat to Bitcoin
data.description: CryptoQuant CEO Ki Young Ju has raised concerns about the vulnerability of nearly 6.89 million BTC held in old Bitcoin addresses to potential quantum computing attacks. According to NS3.AI, Ju highlights the importance of not only implementing technical solutions but also establishing a social consensus to freeze these dormant coins as a measure against quantum threats. He urges for immediate discussions on the matter, noting that social adoption often trails behind technological progress.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | Poland's Senate to Discuss SAFE Plan for Military Enhancement
data.description: Poland's Defense Minister announced that the Senate will discuss a bill today aimed at implementing the 'European Security Action' (SAFE) plan. According to Jin10, this initiative represents the largest opportunity in history to strengthen Poland's military forces. The plan is expected to significantly enhance the country's defense capabilities.

data.title: SBI Funds Plans Major IPO Filing Next Month
data.description: SBI Funds Management is preparing to file draft papers for an initial public offering (IPO) next month, potentially marking the largest listing by an asset management company in India. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the significance of this move in the Indian financial market. The IPO is anticipated to attract considerable attention, given SBI Funds' prominent position in the industry. This development comes as the company seeks to capitalize on favorable market conditions and expand its investor base. Further details about the IPO, including the expected valuation and timeline, are yet to be disclosed.

data.title: Japanese Sushi Chain Gatten Sushi Plans Hong Kong Expansion by 2024
data.description: Japanese sushi chain Gatten Sushi is set to expand into Hong Kong by September 2024. According to Ming Pao, RDC Group's Managing Director, Toshikazu Tabata, expressed confidence in the Hong Kong market due to the local population's willingness to spend on food. The company plans to open locations in Causeway Bay and Tuen Mun within this year, aiming to increase the number of outlets in Hong Kong to ten by 2030.

data.title: Sabrina Carpenter's Influence on Modern Aesthetic
data.description: Crypto KOL Danny (@agintender) posted on X about the recognition of Sabrina Carpenter on a cover image. Carpenter, known for her significant impact on contemporary aesthetic movements, is featured with lyrics from her popular song 'Taste.' The post highlights Carpenter's role as a pioneer in modern aesthetic expression, emphasizing her influence in the realm of music and visual arts.

data.title: CVC Appoints Sanjay Nayar as Chairman of Advisory Board in India
data.description: CVC Capital Partners has appointed Sanjay Nayar, the former head of KKR India, as the chairman of its advisory board in India. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting this strategic move as part of CVC's efforts to strengthen its presence in the South Asian market. Nayar brings extensive experience in the financial sector, having previously led KKR's operations in India. His appointment is expected to enhance CVC's investment strategies and operations in the region. CVC Capital Partners is a leading global private equity and investment advisory firm, and this appointment underscores its commitment to expanding its influence and capabilities in India.

data.title: Whale Accumulation Increases by 200,000 BTC Amid Selling Pressure
data.description:
Darkfost posted on X. Despite ongoing selling pressure, whale accumulation has surged by 200,000 BTC. While whale inflows to exchanges have risen recently, their overall holdings have continued to grow. Typically, inflows indicate short-term behavior and can create immediate selling pressure. However, a medium-term perspective shows a shift in whale behavior, with their holdings increasing by 3.4% after a sharp drop of nearly -7% on December 15.

During this period, the supply held by whales rose from 2.9 million BTC to over 3.1 million BTC, marking an accumulation of more than 200,000 BTC. The last significant whale movement of this scale occurred during the April 2025 correction, which likely helped absorb selling pressure and supported the continuation of the rally, allowing BTC to rise from $76,000 to $126,000.

Currently, with BTC consolidating around 46% below its latest all-time high, these levels are seen as an attractive accumulation zone. Consequently, it is not surprising to observe some whales taking advantage of this opportunity. However, selling pressure remains significant, and the current demand may not yet be sufficient to fully offset it.

data.title: CFTC Chairman Defends Prediction Markets From State Crackdowns
data.description:
Key Takeaways The CFTC says prediction markets fall under federal derivatives law, not state gambling rules.
source: https://coindoo.com/cftc-chairman-defends-prediction-markets-from-state-crackdowns/

data.title: Google CEO Discusses AI Expansion in India with Prime Minister Modi
data.description: Google CEO Sundar Pichai expressed his enthusiasm after meeting with Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi this morning. According to Jin10, the discussion focused on Google's role in promoting artificial intelligence across various sectors in India. The conversation highlighted AI's potential to enhance healthcare, improve access to information in multiple languages, and support startups and agriculture. Pichai emphasized Google's commitment to collaborating with India to leverage AI for societal benefits.

data.title: LEO Pharma Prepares for Potential Stock Market Listing
data.description: LEO Pharma has been actively engaging with potential investors in recent months as it moves forward with plans for a possible stock market listing. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the company's strategic efforts to attract investment interest. The pharmaceutical firm is reportedly in the advanced stages of preparing for an initial public offering, aiming to strengthen its financial position and expand its market presence. This development comes amid a broader trend of healthcare companies seeking public listings to capitalize on market opportunities and drive growth. LEO Pharma's leadership is focused on ensuring a successful transition to the public market, leveraging investor relations to support its long-term objectives.

data.title: BlackRock, Coinbase Set 18% Staking Cut in Ethereum ETF
data.description:
Amended SEC filing details staking revenue split as Ethereum ETFs prepare to offer yield alongside price exposure.
source: https://dailycoin.com/blackrock-coinbase-set-18-staking-cut-in-ethereum-etf/?utm_source=cryptopanic&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Aliko Dangote Advances Succession Plan by Elevating Daughters' Roles
data.description: Africa's wealthiest individual, Aliko Dangote, is advancing his succession strategy by assigning more significant responsibilities to his daughters within his business empire. Bloomberg posted on X that this move is seen as a crucial step in ensuring the continuity of leadership at Dangote's conglomerate. The decision reflects Dangote's commitment to preparing the next generation for leadership roles, ensuring the sustainability and growth of his business interests.

data.title: Strategy's average BTC holding cost has decreased for the first time in 2.5 years.
data.description: According to Arkham monitoring, Michael Saylor's average BTC purchase price has decreased. Strategy's purchase of BTC for $168.4 million lowered MSTR's average cost base by $29 to $76,027. This is the first decline in this figure in nearly two and a half years since September 25, 2023.
